input_transcript: Alice: We need to finish the UI this week. Bob: I will handle the backend API. Carol: Let's meet again on Friday.
target_summary: The team discussed completing the UI this week, assigned the backend API task to Bob, and agreed to meet again on Friday.
target_action_items: Bob will handle the backend API.
The team will meet again on Friday.

input_transcript: David: The transcript quality was not very good in the first half. Emma: We should improve the audio pipeline before the next demo. Frank: I can test the recording settings tomorrow.
target_summary: The team noted poor transcript quality in the first half of the meeting and agreed to improve the audio pipeline before the next demo.
target_action_items: Frank will test the recording settings tomorrow.
The team will improve the audio pipeline before the next demo.

input_transcript: Grace: We need a clearer feedback flow for users after summary generation. Henry: Let us add a rating button and an edit box. Irene: We should store both the original summary and the edited version for retraining.
target_summary: The team discussed adding a clearer feedback flow after summary generation, including a rating button and an edit box, and decided to store both original and edited summaries for retraining.
target_action_items: Add a rating button to the feedback interface.
Add an edit box for summary revision.
Store both original and edited summaries for retraining.
